message:
⚡ Instant startup: show channel list before EPG loads (#84)

- Split _loadChannels into Phase 1 (channels/favorites/groups) and Phase 2 (EPG)
- Phase 1 sets _isLoading=false and renders UI immediately
- Phase 2 (_loadEpgData) runs in background, updates EPG state when ready
- Session restore (last group/channel) runs right after Phase 1
- Vanity names loaded in Phase 1 for correct display names on first render

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
